description: Represents a genomic reference stored in an AWS HealthOmics reference store.

Arn.markdownDescription:
The reference's ARN.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 127  
Pattern: ^arn:.+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Id.markdownDescription:
The reference's ID.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 10  
Maximum Length: 36  
Pattern: ^[0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ReferenceStoreId.markdownDescription:
The reference's reference store ID.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 10  
Maximum Length: 36  
Pattern: ^[0-9]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

Name.markdownDescription:
The reference's name.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 3  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[\p{L}||\p{M}||\p{Z}||\p{S}||\p{N}||\p{P}]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

Description.markdownDescription:
The reference's description.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[\p{L}||\p{M}||\p{Z}||\p{S}||\p{N}||\p{P}]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

Md5.markdownDescription:
The reference's MD5 checksum.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[\p{L}||\p{N}]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Status.markdownDescription:
The reference's status.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ACTIVE | DELETING | DELETED  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CreationTime.markdownDescription:
When the reference was created.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

UpdateTime.markdownDescription:
When the reference was updated.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CreationType.markdownDescription:
The reference's creation type.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: IMPORT  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CreationJobId.markdownDescription:
The reference's creation job ID.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 127  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Key.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Tags.markdownDescription:
Tags for the reference.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: Replacement

---

Minimum Length: 10  
Maximum Length: 36  
Pattern: ^[0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
